raw.explanation: Support to eliminate barriers to accessing housing and prevent evictions and homelessness. This includes assistance with security deposit, move-in costs, furniture, back rent, first and last rent deposit, utility deposits, short term rent relief support, and other related expenses as required and approved. Est. $5,000 to $6,000/families x 30-35 families, includes SRO families in rental subsidy program and those with vouchers as well as those currently living in SROs awaiting future housing access opportunities.

raw.project_name: Chinatown CDC SRO Families Tenant-Based Rental Subsidy Program
raw.project_description: Tenant-based rental subsidy program for SRO family households
raw.explanation: Community Coalition Manager (Garcia) oversees the Case Management team; Subsidy Organizers (Huang Yuen & TBH) assist families with subsidy & housing support; SRO Families Organizers (Zheng & Huang) works directly with SRO families and are supervised by Community Organizer (Dai) & CO Supervisor (Jiang) who also runs SRO Families Community Programs; Program Dir. of CO (Chan) supervises the CO team. Compliance Special Projects Manager (Couch), with support from Sr. Compliance Specialist (Taborsmith), conducts subsidy eligibility review, approval & recertification; Subsidy Admin/APA (Ruan) handles cash management & disbursements to landlords. Program Coordinator (Mei) & Admin Assistant (He) provide admin, reporting & coordination support. Accounting Manager ensure sufficient controls & oversight. Dir. of Prog. Admin. (Kwan) provides contract management. CFO (Lui) & Deputy Director (Hung) oversee Fiscal & Programs Depts to ensure program success.
